license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.d7j9km
title: Comparative metagenomic analysis using VIROME
author: Jaysheel Bhavsar

steps_raw.instruction: Go to VIROME web application . a
Click the login button. a
Enter username and password to authenticate into the application. a
Click the compare button. a
The VIROME Comparinator will appear with a list of both private and public libraries. a
Using the dialogue box below the list you can filter the libraries based on a search term. a
Double click on library names to choose them for analysis. They will appear in the window panel to the right of the list.
Choose desired metric(s) for library comparison. a Taxonomy, function, and environment options can be selected.
Choose the output format(s). a Tab delimited file and Biological Obervation Matrix format for QIME analysis options can be selected.
Click "Submit". a
Click "OK" to download data. a
Once prompted to save the file, do not change the file name!
Navigate to the Finder. a
Double click to unzip the file.
One file for each metric selected should appear. a
Tab delimited files can be opened in Excel spreadsheet. a
Import as text file. a
Enable "All file" types. a
Click "Get Data". a
Click "Next". a
Select "Tab" option. a
Click "Next". a
Click "Finish". a
Click "OK". a
VIROME Comparinator output will appear. a
For more detailed description see video . https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mL0qRR1uYUM&feature=youtu.be&t=2m48s
Open QIIME terminal window. a MacQIIME used for this example.
Run summarize taxa through plots script. a summarize_taxa_through_plots.py
Choose input file. (Example command below) a -i taxonomy.normalized.biom
Choose output file. (Example command below) a -o CB454tax_summ
Designate the mapping file. a -m mapping.txt
Run full script. (Example command below) a summarize_taxa_through_plots.py -i taxonomy.normalized.biom -o CB454tax_summ -m mapping.txt
QIIME will generate stacked bar plots based on the taxonomic data created in VIROME.
Navigate to the Finder. a
Look in taxonomy folder. a
Open taxonomic summary folder. a The name should match the output file designated in QIIME.
Open the bar charts with a web browser. a
Output of libraries that were compared can be seen according to different taxonomic levels that occurred in the biom file. a

In the VIROME Comparinator, click on the QIIME logo for a direct link to the QIIME homepage with information on the package. (Alternatively use link provided in this step) a http://qiime.org/ QIIME can produce many outputs including rarefaction curves to compare alpha diversity pipeline. Can also run beta diversity pipeline to compare libraries in principal component analysis in the King viewer.
For more detailed example see video .
Navigate to the folder with the file.
Open taxonomy summary plots folder. a
For full video tutorial see guidelines. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mL0qRR1uYUM
